tasks.subject: Task 1: clientip extraction core
tasks.description:
Pure spoof-resistant Extract(r, Config) returning the effective client IP host, with exhaustive table tests. Files: pkg/clientip/clientip.go, pkg/clientip/clientip_test.go.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/clientip/clientip.go", "pkg/clientip/clientip_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/clientip/ -run TestExtract -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["direct ignores headers", "header trusted-peer only", "forwarded right-to-left skip", "spoof case returns real client", "ipv6 + malformed handled"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: clientip resolver, store, migration
tasks.description:
DB-backed cached resolver over instance_settings columns with shared ParseStored validation. Files: pkg/clientip/resolver.go, pkg/clientip/store_pg.go, pkg/clientip/resolver_test.go, db/migrations/027_client_ip_config.sql.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/clientip/resolver.go", "pkg/clientip/store_pg.go", "pkg/clientip/resolver_test.go", "db/migrations/027_client_ip_config.sql"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/clientip/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ParseStored validation good+bad cases", "cache + invalidate behavior", "read-error fail-safe to Direct", "migration applies+reverses"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire resolver into server + middleware; retire trust_proxy
tasks.description:
Build resolver once, inject IP into session middleware and every pkg/server IP site, remove static trust_proxy with startup deprecation warning. Files: pkg/configx/configx.go, pkg/session/middleware.go, pkg/server/server.go + all pkg/server ClientIP call sites.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/configx/configx.go", "pkg/session/middleware.go", "pkg/server/server.go", "pkg/server/handle_auth.go", "pkg/server/handle_auth_recovery.go", "pkg/server/handle_pairing.go", "pkg/server/handle_sudo.go", "pkg/server/handle_me.go", "pkg/server/handle_forward_auth_signout.go", "pkg/server/handle_auth_password.go", "pkg/server/handle_enrollment.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./pkg/session/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TrustProxy removed + deprecation warning", "session.ClientIP deleted; LoadSession uses ipOf", "all pkg/server ClientIP sites migrated", "no residual TrustProxy/ClientIP refs", "build+vet+session tests green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Migrate OIDC audit IP sites
tasks.description:
Inject IP func into oidc.Provider; replace 5 audit.ParseIPOrNil(r.RemoteAddr) sites with p.auditIP(r); leave forward_auth X-Forwarded-* untouched. Files: pkg/protocol/oidc/{oidc,logout,revoke,authorize,token}.go, pkg/server/server.go.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/protocol/oidc/oidc.go", "pkg/protocol/oidc/logout.go", "pkg/protocol/oidc/revoke.go", "pkg/protocol/oidc/authorize.go", "pkg/protocol/oidc/token.go", "pkg/server/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Provider.clientIP seam + New param", "5 audit sites use auditIP", "forward_auth untouched", "oidc tests green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Migrate SAML audit IP sites
tasks.description:
Same seam for saml.IdP; replace 5 audit sites with <recv>.auditIP(r). Files: pkg/protocol/saml/{saml,sso,assertion,slo,consent_saml,sso_init}.go, pkg/server/server.go.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/protocol/saml/saml.go", "pkg/protocol/saml/sso.go", "pkg/protocol/saml/assertion.go", "pkg/protocol/saml/slo.go", "pkg/protocol/saml/consent_saml.go", "pkg/protocol/saml/sso_init.go", "pkg/server/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["IdP.clientIP seam + NewIdP param", "5 audit sites use auditIP", "saml tests green", "no residual RemoteAddr audit sites outside admin"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Admin GET/PUT client-IP API
tasks.description:
Admin read + sudo-gated write of the client-IP policy with validation and audit; migrate remaining admin RemoteAddr audit sites. Files: pkg/server/handle_admin_client_ip.go(+test), pkg/server/server.go, pkg/server/handle_admin_settings.go, pkg/server/handle_admin_entity_icon.go.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/handle_admin_client_ip.go", "pkg/server/handle_admin_client_ip_test.go", "pkg/server/server.go", "pkg/server/handle_admin_settings.go", "pkg/server/handle_admin_entity_icon.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/server/ -run ClientIP -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET returns policy JSON", "PUT validates+sudo+204+invalidate+audit", "admin RemoteAddr audit sites migrated", "handler tests green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Dashboard Client IP / Proxy settings card
tasks.description:
New card in SettingsView.vue to view/edit strategy/header/CIDRs, saved through sudo, with i18n (en+zh) and vitest. Files: dashboard/src/pages/admin/SettingsView.vue(+test), dashboard/src/locales/{en,zh}.ts.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/pages/admin/SettingsView.vue", "dashboard/src/pages/admin/SettingsView.test.ts", "dashboard/src/locales/en.ts", "dashboard/src/locales/zh.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/pages/admin/SettingsView.test.ts && npx vue-tsc -b", "acceptanceCriteria": ["loads policy on mount", "conditional header/CIDR fields", "empty-CIDR warning", "save PUT via withSudo with split CIDRs", "vitest + vue-tsc green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Smoke coverage, full gate, dist rebuild
tasks.description:
Live smoke block proving header trusted-peer → 203.0.113.9 and direct → peer; full gate; rebuild + commit dist. Files: cmd/smoke/main.go, pkg/webui/dist.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/smoke/main.go", "pkg/webui/dist"], "verifyCommand": "go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./... && (cd dashboard && npx vitest run && npx vue-tsc -b && node scripts/check-contrast.mjs)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["smoke: header trusted-peer -> 203.0.113.9; direct -> peer", "full gate green", "live smoke SMOKE_EXIT=0", "dist rebuilt+committed"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
